summary:
Claim: Post-exposure prophylaxis is necessary despite prior vaccination and pet vaccination.  
Evidence: - Rabies is almost always fatal once symptoms appear; even minor wounds carry theoretical risk. - Pre-vaccination immunity may wane over time, especially beyond one year post-final dose.  
Answer: C
formatted_summary:

Evidence: - Rabies is almost always fatal once symptoms appear; even minor wounds carry theoretical risk. - Pre-vaccination immunity may wane over time, especially beyond one year post-final dose.  
Answer: C. Answer choice: B
